response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong web/product experience and some D/C++ exposure, but does not meet the core minimums for this role. The JD requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems plus cloud compute platform leadership; the resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015), no demonstrated cloud compute platform work, and no formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, embedded, and systems work
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform with Kubernetes deployment experience
Active community contributor — workshops, talks, TDD/craftsmanship advocacy
concerns: Far short of 8 years C++ — only a brief NI LabWindows/CVI stint in C/C++
No evidence of large-scale distributed cloud compute platform ownership
No formal tech lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale distributed systems leadership
Strong software craftsmanship and polyglot breadth
